mapper.select: SELECT id AS id ,user_id AS userId ,email_address AS emailAddress ,nick_name AS nickName ,approved AS approved ,approved_at AS approvedAt ,admin AS admin ,blocked AS blocked ,deleted AS deleted ,created_at AS createdAt ,created_by AS createdBy ,updated_at AS updatedAt ,updated_by AS updatedBy FROM genesis_user WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND email_address = #{email}

SELECT id AS id ,user_id AS userId ,email_address AS emailAddress ,nick_name AS nickName ,approved AS approved ,approved_at AS approvedAt ,admin AS admin ,blocked AS blocked ,deleted AS deleted ,created_at AS createdAt ,created_by AS createdBy ,updated_at AS updatedAt ,updated_by AS updatedBy FROM genesis_user WHERE user_id = #{userId}
